title: viola spathulata var. spathulata
intro: Viola spathulata var. spathulata, also known as the Spatulate Violet, is a type of flowering plant in the viola family that is native to the mountainous regions of central Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of Viola spathulata var. spathulata include its ability to reduce swelling, alleviate pain, and promote wound healing, making it a valuable remedy for skin conditions and injuries. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in infusions, tinctures, and salves, and is also used as a natural dye for textiles.
